win: Got the SQLite memory store saving cards and skills in one atomic write.
overcame: Kept corrupting the skills table on insert until I wrapped both writes in a transaction.

win: Wired the Express backend to talk to the Anthropic API and return clean Card JSON.
overcame: The model kept wrapping JSON in prose — fixed it by forcing a JSON-only system prompt.

win: Finally understood how eigenvectors fall out of the covariance matrix in PCA.
overcame: Stared at the linear algebra for two hours before the geometric picture clicked.

win: Pitched our concept to the team and got everyone aligned on the trading-card idea.
overcame: I was nervous to push back on the leaderboard idea, but I made the case anyway.

win: Built the type-bucketing logic that sorts a win into its life domain.
overcame: Had to design the semantic-memory table before the sorting made any sense.

win: Debugged the linear-algebra bug in the radar chart math on my own.
overcame: Same matrix math that stopped me cold yesterday — this time I just fixed it.

win: Set up a simple budget to track the team's snack and supply spend for the weekend.
overcame: Never tracked a shared budget before — wasn't sure how to split shared costs.

win: Sketched the card-back art for the binder during a break and people loved it.
overcame: Hadn't drawn in months and almost didn't share it.

win: Shipped the whole memory + extraction pipeline end to end before midnight.
overcame: Three hours of CORS and JSON-parse errors that nearly broke the demo.
